[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001111101 6
1 001001011 4
2 001011010 4
3 010100000 2
4 110101110 6
5 011100011 5
6 000100000 1
7 000101000 2

01 10 000110001 3
12 21 000111001 4
23 32 001001001 3
34 43 001001010 3
45 54 000000000 a
56 65 010100000 2 match 3
67 76 010100010 3
70 07 000100001 2

02 20 000110101 4
13 31 000001001 2
24 42 001011000 3
35 53 000000000 a
46 64 000001010 2
57 75 010100000 2 match 3
60 06 100100100 3
71 17 000100001 2

03 30 000000001 1
14 41 000011000 2
25 52 000100000 1 match 6
36 63 000001010 2
47 74 001000010 2
50 05 000100000 1 match 6
61 16 000101000 2 match 7
72 27 001100001 3

04 40 000010000 1
15 51 000100000 1 match 6
26 62 000101100 3
37 73 001000011 3
